title: Broadcast Event Propagation Flow
interaction_flow: EventService → EventService: match listeners by prefix (outer.*)
EventService → BroadcastService(backend): outBroadcastEventHandler(key, data, meta) [registered via svc_event.on('outer.*', ...)]
BroadcastService(backend) → BroadcastService(backend): guard — if meta.from_outside return early
note: flush timer fires after outboundFlushMs (default 2000-5000ms)
BroadcastService(backend) → BroadcastService(backend): #flushOutboundEvents() — collect events, clear map
BroadcastService(backend) → WebhookPeer: POST /broadcast/webhook [headers: X-Broadcast-Peer-Id, X-Broadcast-Timestamp, X-Broadcast-Nonce, X-Broadcast-Signature]
WebhookPeer → BroadcastService(backend): POST /broadcast/webhook (incoming from remote peer)
BroadcastService(backend) → BroadcastService(backend): #handleRedisPubSubMessage — skip if sourceId == self
BroadcastService(GUI) → AppIframe: postMessage({msg:'broadcast', name, data}, '*') [to each .window-app-iframe[data-appUsesSDK=true]]
BroadcastService(GUI): sendSavedBroadcastsTo(appInstanceID) → postMessage each saved broadcast to specific iframe
key_relationships: BroadcastService(backend) depends_on axios [for outbound webhook POST]
EventService uses Context.arun for async listener isolation
IPCService(GUI) extends Service — manages InternalConnection objects between processes

event_key_patterns.outbound_trigger: outer.*  (wildcard — any outer.X event triggers outBroadcastEventHandler)
event_key_patterns.redis_filter: outer.pub or outer.pub.*  (only pub events forwarded via Redis pub/sub)

security_model.replay_protection: timestamp window (#webhookReplayWindowSeconds=300s) + monotonic nonce per peer

important_notes: outboundFlushMs default is 2000ms (config) falling back to 5000ms — events are batched, not sent immediately
Dedup: events are keyed by JSON.stringify(event) before flush — duplicates within a flush window are collapsed
Redis pub/sub mirrors all outer.pub events to same-cluster replicas (sourceId prevents self-echo)
GUI BroadcastService is entirely separate from backend BroadcastService — GUI uses postMessage to iframes
IPCService (GUI) is not in the outbound broadcast path — it handles internal process-to-process comms
